topics.title: Pollutants: Sources, Formation, and Effects on Environment and Humans
Emission Standards and Regulations: International, European Union, and Indian Standards
Compliance with Standards: Certification, Assembly Lane Testing, In-Use Surveillance, and Recall
Mechanism of Pollutant Formation in SI and CI Engines: NOx, CO, Particles, Soot, and HC Compounds (Aldehydes, Ketones, Alcohols, and Organic Acids)
Non-Exhaust Emissions: Crankcase, Evaporative, Refuelling, and On-Road Emissions
Emission Measurement and Testing Procedures for Light-Duty, Heavy-Duty Vehicles, and Two Wheelers
Emission Control Technologies for Gasoline Fuelled Vehicles: A/F Ratio and Electronic Control
Catalytic Converters: Two-Way and Three-Way Converters, Wear and Poisoning
Emission Control for Diesel Fuelled Vehicles: Engine Design, EGR, Crankcase, Evaporative, and Fuel Distribution Control
Exhaust After-Treatment: Particulate Trap, Diesel Oxidation Catalyst (DOC), and Diesel Exhaust Fluid (DEF)
Emission Inspection Procedures: SI Engines, Exhaust and Evaporative Emissions, and Motorcycle White Smoke
Institutional Setting for Inspection and Maintenance: Centralized and Decentralized I/M
Vehicle Replacement and Retrofit Programs: Scrap Age, Relocation, Replacement, and Retrofit
